sections.sectionTitle: Jerusalem A Kiumcihna Ding Ezekiel in Lak

verses.text: Tua khit ciangin, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, leiseek khat la-in na mai-ah koih in la, Jerusalem khuapi lahna-in tua leiseek tung git in
Tua ciangin tua khuapi a kiumcihna lahna dingin na kiimah dumte, phungte, galpan'na phualte, leh kulh sukkhapna ding molhtumte bawl in

Tua ciangin sikpeek khat la in la, nang leh khuapi kikalah kulh lim dingin koih in. Tua ciangin khuapi lam en in. Tua khuapi a kiumcih hi-in, nang pen a umcihte' lim ding na hi hi. Hih pen Israel mite-a' dingin lim hi ding hi
“Tua ciangin na veilam pang delphahin lum in. Israel mite' mawhna hanga gimna nangma tungah kong nga ding hi. Tua lai munah lumin amaute' mawhna
ni za thum leh ni sawmkua sung na thuak ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amau' gimthuak ding kum khat sung dingin ni khat, amau' thuak ding kum zah nangmah in a ni-in na thuak ding hi

Hih bangin na gamtat khit ciangin na taklam delhphahin na kihei leuleu ding a, Judah mite' mawhna ni sawmli sung gim na thuak leuleu ding hi. Nangma thuak ni khat pen amau' thuak ding kum khat tang ahi hi
Tua ciangin Jerusalem khuapi a kiumcihna sal gega in. Na puan-ak ban zialto in la, tua khuapi siatna ding thu gen in
Nang pen khauhual tawh kong hencip ding a, tua khuapi umcihna a kiman mateng na kihei thei kei ding hi

“Tu-in mangbuh, mangbuhham, belawi, taang, leh mangbuhman pawlkhat la in la, tuate hel khawmin anlumin bawl in. Na veilam delhphahin na lup hun ni za thum leh ni sawmkua sung tua na bawl anlum na ne ding hi
Nek khatin anlum shekel sawmnih gik bek na ne ding a, ni khatin khatvei bek na ne ding hi
Tui zong duh zahzah hiloin, ni khatin thawl khat bek na dawn ding hi
Na nek ding anlum pen mite' muhin mihing ekkeu khawmin tuate mei-in na cih khit ciangin tua sungah na em ding hi,” hong ci hi
Tua ciangin Topa in, “Israel mite, gamdangah ka thehthang hun ciangin thukham in nek dingin a kham an ninte tu-a mah bangin ne ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi

Ahi zongin kei zong ka dawngkik a, “Topa Pasian aw, cikmahin kei ka kininsak ngei kei hi. Ka neu tunga kipan tudongin ama thu-in a sitawm ganhing sa ahi a, gamsate' nekbang ahi zongin ka ne ngei kei hi. A nin-in a kiseh an khat peuhpeuh ka ne ngei nai kei hi,” ka ci hi
Tua ciangin amah in, “Tua ahih leh pha hi. Mihing ek tangin bawng-ek na zang ding a, tua bawng-ek am sungah na em ding hi,” a hong ci hi
Tua ciangin amah in thu hong genthuah lai a, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Jerusalem khuapi sungah an ka beisak ding a, mite in lunghihmawhna tawh a annek a tuidawnte uh ciangtan ding uh hi
An leh tui loin amaute om ding uh a, amaute lunggimin, a tawpna-ah a mawhna hangun beimang ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi.
